2604.07189.title: Agent-Driven Corpus Linguistics: A Framework for Autonomous Linguistic Discovery
2604.07189.paper_summary: Corpus linguistics has traditionally relied on human researchers to formulate hypotheses, construct queries, and interpret results - a process demanding specialized technical skills and considerable time. We propose Agent-Driven Corpus Linguistics, an approach in which a large language model (LLM), connected to a corpus query engine via a structured tool-use interface, takes over the investigative cycle: generating hypotheses, querying the corpus, interpreting results, and refining analysis across multiple rounds. The human researcher sets direction and evaluates final output. Unlike unconstrained LLM generation, every finding is anchored in verifiable corpus evidence. We treat this not as a replacement for the corpus-based/corpus-driven distinction but as a complementary dimension: it concerns who conducts the inquiry, not the epistemological relationship between theory and data. We demonstrate the framework by linking an LLM agent to a CQP-indexed Gutenberg corpus (5 million tokens) via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Given only "investigate English intensifiers," the agent identified a diachronic relay chain (so+ADJ > very > really), three pathways of semantic change (delexicalization, polarity fixation, metaphorical constraint), and register-sensitive distributions. A controlled baseline experiment shows that corpus grounding contributes quantification and falsifiability that the model cannot produce from training data alone. To test external validity, the agent replicated two published studies on the CLMET corpus (40 million tokens) - Claridge (2025) and De Smet (2013) - with close quantitative agreement. Agent-driven corpus research can thus produce empirically grounded findings at machine speed, lowering the technical barrier for a broader range of researchers.
2604.07189.paper_summary_zh: 語料庫語言學傳統上依賴人類研究者來制定假設、構建查詢和解釋結果——這一過程需要專門的技術技能和相當的時間。我們提出了代理驅動的語料庫語言學，這是一種方法，其中一個大型語言模型（LLM）通過結構化的工具使用介面連接到語料庫查詢引擎，接管調查循環：生成假設、查詢語料庫、解釋結果並在多輪中精煉分析。人類研究者設置方向並評估最終輸出。與不受限制的LLM生成不同，每一個發現都基於可驗證的語料庫證據。我們將此視為對語料庫基礎/語料庫驅動區別的補充維度：它關乎誰進行調查，而不是理論與數據之間的認識論關係。我們通過將LLM代理連接到經CQP索引的古騰堡語料庫（500萬個標記）來演示該框架，並通過模型上下文協議（MCP）進行連接。在僅給出“調查英語強調詞”的情況下，該代理識別了一個歷時性的中繼鏈（so+ADJ > very > really）、三條語義變化的途徑（去詞彙化、極性固定、隱喻約束）和註冊敏感的分佈。一項受控基線實驗顯示，語料庫基礎提供了量化和可證偽性，而這是模型僅從訓練數據無法產生的。為了測試外部有效性，該代理複製了兩項發表的研究，分別是CLMET語料庫（4000萬個標記）上的Claridge（2025）和De Smet（2013），並達成了密切的定量一致性。因此，代理驅動的語料庫研究可以以機器速度產生經實證基礎的發現，降低了更廣泛研究者的技術門檻。
2604.07189.author: Jia Yu et.al.
2604.07189.authors: Jia Yu, Weiwei Yu, Pengfei Xiao, Fukun Xing
